name: Olin Library 1
description: Main floor of the library. The help desk is located here, where you can borrow books, chargers, and other equipment.

name: Olin Library 2
description: Second floor of the library. Lots of comfy seats and access to the sky room. Often described as being quiet but not too quiet.

name: Olin Library 3
description: Third floor of the library. There are a lot of cubicles for individual study. The noise level is silent.

name: Kranzberg Library
description: The architecture library East of the WashU campus. It got some natural lighting. It has plenty of machines available for processing physical and digital media, such as document scanners and paper cutters.

name: Gustavus A. Pfeiffer Physics Library
description: The architecture library East of the WashU campus.

name: Al and Ruth Kopolow Library
description: The business library located in the second floor of Simon Hall.

name: Brown Library
description: The Brown library is located on the third floor of Brown Hall and is focused on serving the Brown School of Public Health.

name: East Asian Library
description: The East Asian library located on the East end of campus.

name: Brookings Quad
description: Located on the East end of campus, it has plenty of benches in the shade and sun, perfect for getting work done on days with nice weather with the gorgeous Brookings Hall in view.
